message:
fix: remove unnecessary unsafe in X11 DnD, fix xdg appearance comparison, and minor cleanups

X11 window (x11/window.rs):
- Remove four unnecessary `unsafe` blocks around xcb::x::Window::new()
  and Atom::new() calls in the drag-and-drop message handler — these
  constructors are safe in current xcb crate versions and wrapping them
  in unsafe was misleading about the actual safety contract

xdg_desktop_portal.rs:
- Fix appearance comparison: change `CachedAppearance::Some(appearance)`
  to `CachedAppearance::Some(*appearance)` to dereference the borrowed
  value before constructing the enum variant, matching the expected
  Copy semantics

connection.rs:
- Fix test assertion formatting: change `{other:?}` inline format to
  `{:?}, other` positional format for consistency with surrounding code

spike_comparison.rs:
- Add .expect() to Select::new result to handle the new Result return
  type from asupersync's select combinator

Beads tracker: sync issue metadata to current state

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
